commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and exact-head CI gating.; Cleared: The diff is test-only and introduces no dependency, script, workflow, credential, network, or runtime security surface. (sha=fccb625071fadced8155b2f28a1da1928d05cba5)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `Tests/CodexBarTests/DocumentationLinkTests.swift` to validate README and provider documentation links, anchors, images, HTML destinations, local path normalization, and code-example exclusions.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds preventive documentation-link test coverage rather than reporting a runtime bug. The affected behavior is reviewable from the one added test file and the README/docs link surface it targets.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and exact-head CI gating.

target.title: test: cover local documentation links
target.body:
## Summary
- add repository-local documentation guards for README Markdown links, images, and HTML `href`/`src` destinations
- verify provider overview `Details:` references resolve under `docs/`
- normalize anchors, query strings, URL encoding, and relative paths while rejecting traversal outside `docs/`
- ignore inline and fenced code examples so documentation snippets do not become false positives

## Exact-head proof
- candidate: `6e4480a385b8244bf5513bee7bfd7e131066b541`
- focused: `DocumentationLinkTests` passed 8/8
- repository checks: package-path, dSYM, and Sparkle signing guards passed; SwiftFormat reported 0 files; SwiftLint reported 0 violations
- package workflow: ad-hoc release app built; deep code-sign validation passed; app, CLI helper, and widget executables were present; packaged CLI reported version 0.35.1
- local structured autoreview: clean, no actionable findings
- Public Model Identifier Gate: PASS
- privacy/public-proof gate: PASS
- exact-head GitHub Actions: macOS lint and deterministic 436-suite tests passed; Linux x64 and arm64 release builds, tests, and CLI smoke checks passed

## Risk
Test-only maintenance. No runtime behavior, dependency, release, or changelog change.
target.author: kiranmagic7
